description: Internalized v2.1.0 gateway with fortress enforcement, studio integrations, venture operations hooks, and hardened observability.
Stateless Playwright CLI wrapper for browser install and one-shot automation tasks with deterministic JSON outputs.
FastMCP Playwright server wrapper for interactive, session-based browser automation.
Encrypted credential vault using LSL_MASTER_KEY with audited set/get/list operations.
Ephemeral Docker runtime for isolated command execution with memory limits and default network isolation.
Langfuse-based usage telemetry tool with silent local fallback, host defaulting, and vault-managed credentials.
Supabase-backed memory tool with scoped recall plus Markdown notes in lsl_memory.notes.
n8n workflow API tool for read, create, activate/deactivate, and trigger operations with vault-backed API keys.
Stripe billing operations tool with vault-backed API key and invoice retrieval commands.
Shopify commerce operations tool with vault-backed access token and product listing commands.
Document engine for OCR via unstructured, conversion via pandoc, and Markdown print-to-Google-Doc.
Multi-tier research gateway with cost-aware routing across web, neural, brief, and social tiers.
Deterministic echo utility for smoke-testing parser and wrapper pipelines.
Calendar scheduling helper that uses gw to suggest Project Review time slots in deterministic JSON.
Ad performance monitor for Spend vs CTR anomaly detection using gw bridge inputs and deterministic JSON alerts.
Secure webhook trigger bridge for local n8n workflows using gw commands and Vault-backed token retrieval.
Uploads assets through gw and registers metadata records for retrieval in lsl_memory.assets.
Unified social wrapper for posting and comment retrieval across YouTube, TikTok, and X via gw.
Golden template for creating production-grade LiNKskills skills.
Designs, migrates, and refines production-grade skills following the LiNKskills Golden Template.
Designs, wraps, and validates CLI-first tools for the LiNKskills Global Tools Registry.
Designs n8n workflows as JSON, creates them via API, then activates and tests them autonomously.
Enforces progress-sync handoffs, branch discipline, and staged file commit safeguards.
Enforces predictive intent logging to GWAuditLogger before write actions across GW and n8n.
Requires mandatory safety checklist review (`git status`, `git diff --cached`) before any push.
Applies Factored Cognition to break complex studio work into atomic verifiable plans.
Enforces evidence-first outputs by requiring Memory/Search/File citation for every claim.
Runs System 2 self-audit loops to detect and correct errors before finalization.
Analyzes execution_ledger trends to propose versioned upgrades for library tools and skills.
Defines research intent, confidence-based tier escalation, and HITL controls for deep research sessions.
Refactored senior execution model for PRD decomposition, factory.json routing, and sub-agent sessions_spawn coordination.
Template-first architecture skill that enforces factory.json discovery and baseline initialization before custom development.
Design system enforcement skill using Playwright-driven visual regression audits and policy-based gating.
Independent QA skill with recurrence tracking through Supabase-backed BUG_HISTORY memory.
DevOps/SRE skill for Dockerization, VPS deployment hardening, and LSL_MASTER_KEY security enforcement.
Transforms a vibe or idea into a professional technical specification with architecture, constraints, and acceptance criteria.
Runs competitor teardown and SWOT analysis using tiered research workflows and confidence-based escalation.
COO coordination skill for managing Lead Engineer and QA execution via PROGRESS.md-driven governance.
Software PM skill that decomposes PRDs into factory-aligned technical backlogs with QA-gated Definition of Done.
Escalation skill that triggers Root Cause Analysis when worker PROGRESS.md remains Blocked beyond two turns.
Aggregates lsl_memory.audit_logs and PROGRESS.md streams into Venture Studio Health Reports for COO oversight.
Senior VP of Growth skill that decomposes product PRDs into multi-channel strategy with mandatory MARKETING_STRATEGY.md output.
Reverse-engineers competitor keyword strategy via Brave/Exa research and outputs prioritized content gaps.
Normalizes YouTube, AdSense, and Stripe revenue inputs into canonical Venture Studio Transaction records.
Senior Creative Lead skill that decomposes marketing briefs into asset orders and orchestrates n8n rendering triggers.
High-fidelity creative QA gate that audits assets against brand guidelines and PRD with mandatory PASS/FAIL plus revision logic.
Platform operations skill for YouTube, TikTok, and X scheduling, comment management, and support-to-sales funnel execution.
Platform legal and safety specialist for YouTube/Meta terms monitoring, AI disclosures, and publication compliance gating.
Analyzes views, CTR, and sentiment to deliver high-signal strategic feedback loops back to marketing.
Financial oversight skill delivering GAAP reporting, reconciliation, and Supabase lsl_finance transaction logging.
Senior document manager skill for hybrid Supabase/GDrive storage and OCR indexing of financial/legal documents.
Exec sync skill that starts 06:00 Taipei data collection and produces the 08:00 AM Wins/Blockers/Financial Health briefing.
